title: Bridge Essay: Unveiling the Neural Signature of Group Cohesion in Music Co-Audition.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ritual** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Phase Ritual bridge-v3 targeted acquisition.

**Unveiling the Neural Signature of Group Cohesion in Music Co-Audition.** — Annals of the New York Academy of Sciences (2025). PMID: 41100758. DOI: 10.1111/nyas.70105. Score: 67. Music serves as auniversal medium for social bonding and emotional synchronization, yet the neural mechanisms underpinning these collective experiences remain elusive. This study examines how spatio-temporal music co-audition influences emotional convergence, social cohesion, and neural synchronization in group settings.
